title: Parambarai
desc: Paramasivan has a rocky relationship with his father following the tragic murder of his mother. To make matters more complicated, he falls in love with the daughter of a ruthless landlord.

title: Sengathu Boomiyile
desc: Vallarasu and Chinnasamy are two friends who come from closely related families. However, a fateful incident drives a wedge between them, culminating in a violent fight.

title: Oru Thalai Raagam
desc: Subhadra's mother faces criticism from society after her father abandons them. Her mother wishes Subhadra to live a scrupulous life but is shocked when she falls in love with Raja.

title: Jithan 2
desc: A man with a reserved nature finds his life in danger when he discovers that his newly purchased home is haunted by a ghost.

title: Thai Maaman
desc: Meena refuses to marry Rasappan as he is uneducated and rustic. In order to win her heart, he decides to become a minister and achieve success.
